testgroup.title: DTC / freeze frame data check, record and clearance
testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s)?

paragroup.ptxt: Print DTC and freeze frame data or write them down and clear them by referring to DTC Clearance . Then go to Step 3.
Repair or replace malfunction part. Then go to Step 11.
Repair or replace defective part. Then go to Step 11.

testgroup.title: Rechecking and recording of DTC / freeze frame data

test1.ptxt: Recheck for DTC (current and pending DTC) and freeze frame data.

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s)?

testgroup.title: Rechecking and recording of DTC / freeze frame data

test1.ptxt: Recheck for DTC and freeze frame data.

testgroup.question: Is there any DTC(s)?

testgroup.title: CVT basic check and CVT symptom diagnosis

test1.ptxt: Perform CVT basic check and CVT symptom diagnosis.

testgroup.question: Are check and repair completed?

paragroup.ptxt: Check and repair defective part(s). Then go to Step 11.
Check and repair defective part(s). Then go to Step 11.
Repair or replace defective part(s). Then go to Step 11.

testgroup.title: Final confirmation test
testgroup.question: Is there any problem symptom, DTC or abnormal condition?

servinfosub.title: Step 1. Customer Complaint Analysis
servinfosub.ptxt: Record details of the problem (failure, complaint) and how it occurred as described by the customer.
For this purpose, use of such an inspection form as shown in the following table as an example will facilitate collecting information to the point required for proper analysis and diagnosis.

attention3.ptxt: The form is a standard sample. It should be modified according to characteristics of each market.

servinfosub.title: Step 2. DTC / Freeze Frame Data Check, Record and Clearance
servinfosub.ptxt: First, check DTC (current and pending DTC).
If DTC is indicated, print DTC and freeze frame data or write them down and then clear them.

servinfosub.title: Step 3 and 4. Visual Inspection
servinfosub.ptxt: As a preliminary step, be sure to perform visual check of the items that support proper function of engine and CVT.

topic.title: In case that there is no DTC at Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Based on information obtained in Step 1. Customer Complaint Analysis and Step 2. DTC / Freeze Frame Data Check, Record and Clearance , confirm trouble symptoms.

topic.title: In case that there is any DTC at Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Recheck DTC according to “DTC Confirmation Procedure” described in each DTC troubleshooting.

servinfosub.title: Step 6 and 7. Rechecking and Record of DTC and Freeze Frame Data
servinfosub.ptxt: Refer to DTC Check for checking procedure.

servinfosub.title: Step 8. CVT Basic Check and CVT Symptom Diagnosis

s1.ptxt: In case there is no faulty part found in inspection procedure of “CVT basic check”, perform CVT Symptom Diagnosis based on symptom found in vehicle checking in the following items.

servinfosub.title: Step 9. Troubleshooting for DTC
servinfosub.ptxt: Perform applicable DTC troubleshooting and repair or replace faulty parts.

topic.title: In case that there is no DTC at Step 2:
In case that there is any DTC at Step 2:
topic.ptxt: Check parts related to detected DTC (e.g., wire harness, connector, etc.).

servinfosub.title: Step 11. Final Confirmation Test
servinfosub.ptxt: Confirm that the problem symptom has gone and the vehicle is free from any abnormal conditions. If what has been repaired is related to DTC, clear DTC once, perform DTC confirmation procedure and confirm that no DTC is indicated.
